Shauna Schramke.short: Visual artist Shauna Schramke paints quirky homes into timescapes & portals, revealing the beauty in offbeat architecture.
Shauna Schramke.medium: Shauna Schramke's vibrant paintings bring old homes to life, capturing their unique personalities and stories. Her artwork is a love letter to the introverted and underappreciated.
Shauna Schramke.long: Get lost in Shauna Schramke's whimsical world of painted wood and out-of-plumb foundations. Her houses are people – portraits of those who live on the fringes, yet possess hearts full of charm and character.

Emily von Stuckrad-Smolinski.short: Emily von Stuckrad-Smolinski's oil paintings burst with texture & depth, born from experimentation with tools like finger touches, palette knives & air compressors.
Emily von Stuckrad-Smolinski.medium: Meet Emily von Stuckrad-Smolinski, a Daytonian artist who finds comfort in oil painting. Her works defy traditional boundaries, merging technique & material to create rich textures that come alive through unorthodox tools.
Emily von Stuckrad-Smolinski.long: Get lost in the textured world of Emily von Stuckrad-Smolinski's oil paintings! A life-long Daytonian, she combines innovative techniques with bold materials, evoking a sense of excitement and energy. Her process is akin to running a long-distance race - each piece comes alive through a journey of experimentation & creative freedom.

Alicia Sault.short: Alicia Sault's artwork embodies a thoughtful approach to beauty, showcasing that talent is not a pre-requisite.
Alicia Sault.medium: Artist Alicia Sault's style reflects Art Academy of Dayton's educational philosophy, making extraordinary art accessible to all. Her unique perspective creates beautiful pieces without relying on innate talent.
Alicia Sault.long: Alicia Sault's artistic vision aligns with the Art Academy of Dayton's mission: that great artists are trained, not born. Her creative process is a testament to this approach, resulting in stunning artwork that showcases her skill and dedication.

David Leach.short: David Leach's intricate drawings unfold like maps of the human experience, tracing lines between nature, memory & architecture.
David Leach.medium: David Leach's unique style weaves together drawn lines, flora, and interior spaces in thought-provoking prints that explore the intersection of art and community. His work is held in the collections of MoMA and the Cincinnati Museum of Art, among others.
David Leach.long: David Leach's artistic journey spans decades, from his printmaking days at Wright State University to his current exploration of landscape, architecture, and interior space through intricate drawings that unfold like maps of the human experience. His work not only engages with the community but also reflects a deep sense of art engaging with the world we live in.

Kurt Smolinski.short: Kurt's vibrant artwork unfolds with bold colors and dynamic pours, reflecting his creative process.
Kurt Smolinski.medium: Kurt's artistic style is a symphony of color and movement, as he lets the pouring technique guide him to create unique masterpieces. His passion shines through in every brushstroke.
Kurt Smolinski.long: Get swept away by Kurt's kinetic artwork, where swirling colors meet dynamic pours. With a technique honed through trial and error, Kurt brings an unmistakable energy to each piece, reflecting his own creative spirit.

Craig Screven.short: Craig Screven weaves vibrant emotions onto digital canvases, blending traditional and modern techniques.
Craig Screven.medium: Craig Screven's artwork vibrates with energy as he merges digital innovation with traditional media, inspired by African American culture and history. His emotional impressions of life come alive in a kaleidoscope of color.
Craig Screven.long: Craig Screven is an innovative artist who distills the essence of life into dynamic digital images, often incorporating traditional techniques like pastels and oil paint. Influenced by African American artistry and culture, he explores themes of history, music, and family gatherings with bold colors and movement.

Linda Hart.short: Linda Hart's watercolors capture the hidden beauty in decaying industrial landscapes, inviting viewers to ponder their transformation over time.
Linda Hart.medium: Linda Hart's vibrant watercolors reveal the unexpected beauty in crumbling industrial structures, juxtaposing decay with nature's resilience. Her art inspires us to reevaluate our surroundings.
Linda Hart.long: With a keen eye for the overlooked, Linda Hart's watercolors transform decaying industrial landscapes into abstract masterpieces, reflecting on time's passage and nature's regenerative power. Her dual series, 'Chasing Urban Shadows' and 'Floral Fragments', showcase her artistic evolution and lifelong appreciation for beauty in all forms.

Ching Chung.short: Ching, a visual digital artist, sparks imagination with bright & whimsical art. Her love of color, design, and tradition shines through in each vibrant piece.
Ching Chung.medium: Ching's unique perspective combines Asian heritage with industrial design expertise, resulting in enchanting, colorful digital art that transports viewers to a world of wonder.
Ching Chung.long: Get lost in the vibrant world of Ching, where bright colors and whimsical designs transport you to a realm of joy and imagination. As an Asian immigrant & industrial designer, she infuses her art with tradition, love of color, and expertise in spatial design.

Joshua Smith.short: Joshua Smith weaves imaginative worlds with expressive linework, blurring the line between reality and fantasy.
Joshua Smith.medium: Self-taught illustrator Joshua Smith crafts detailed illustrations that blend imaginative worlds with emotive linework, revealing his unique perspective on life.
Joshua Smith.long: With a passion for visual storytelling, Joshua Smith's work is a reflection of his personal journey of artistic discovery. His highly detailed illustrations blur the line between reality and fantasy, inviting viewers to enter his imaginative world.

Jesse Ly.short: Jesse Ly blends photography with sculpture & writing to explore identity structures through image-making.
Jesse Ly.medium: Asian-American artist Jesse Ly uses photographic approaches to examine identity, relationships & existence. Their work navigates the transitional qualities of imagery and its impact on presence and portrayal.
Jesse Ly.long: Visual storyteller Jesse Ly combines photography with sculpture, bookmaking, and writing to probe the complexities of human experience. By scrutinizing the relationship between image and reality, they invite us to reevaluate our perceptions and understanding of existence.

Bonnie Kuntz.short: Bonnie creates vibrant watercolor & mixed-media pieces that capture the uncertainty of life.
Bonnie Kuntz.medium: Bonnie's artwork is a reflection of her adventurous spirit, experimenting with mediums & subjects to create unique, unpredictable pieces. Her love for nature, animals, and Eastern healing arts shines through in her paintings.
Bonnie Kuntz.long: With a background in art education and nursing, Bonnie brings a curious and creative approach to her watercolor, acrylic, and mixed-media art. Inspired by the unpredictability of life, she explores new mediums & subjects, often incorporating themes from nature, animals, and Eastern healing arts.

Jo Anne Vincent.short: Jo Anne Vincent's jewelry is a harmonious blend of color, pattern & texture, showcasing her unique design eye.
Jo Anne Vincent.medium: Jo Anne Vincent creates stunning sterling silver & copper jewelry with an eclectic mix of beads from around the world. Her passion for color & uniqueness shines through in every piece.
Jo Anne Vincent.long: Jo Anne Vincent's artistic vision is brought to life through her intricate sterling silver & copper jewelry, featuring a treasure trove of global beads and gemstones. With a keen eye for design, she crafts one-of-a-kind pieces that celebrate individuality.

Samantha Farkas.short: Samantha Farkas' vibrant line drawings capture the intricate beauty of Midwestern wildlife and beyond.
Samantha Farkas.medium: Ohio native Samantha Farkas weaves tales of wonder through her dynamic line drawings, inspired by the birds and beasts of North America, Japan, and Central Europe. Her work invites us to notice oft-overlooked details of our surroundings.
Samantha Farkas.long: Samantha Farkas' artistic journey has taken her across continents, from Ohio to Japan and Central Europe, in search of inspiration from local flora and fauna. Her vibrant line drawings bring to life the intricate beauty of the natural world, encouraging us to slow down and appreciate the majesty that surrounds us.

Alison Bour.short: Alison Bour combines traditional & digital artistry, using photography as a canvas for abstract creations.
Alison Bour.medium: Alison Bour blends traditional techniques with digital wizardry, harnessing the power of photography to breathe life into abstract masterpieces. Her passion for exploration drives her creative journey.
Alison Bour.long: Alison Bour's unique artistic voice emerges from the fusion of traditional and digital artistry. Using photography as a foundation, she crafts abstract works that showcase her innovative spirit and willingness to take risks. Whether it's capturing the beauty of nature or experimenting with bold, vibrant colors, Alison's art is a testament to her creative vision.

Ariel White.short: Ariel White's art is a serious celebration of nature & its creatures, bringing joy to all who see it.
Ariel White.medium: Ariel White's unique style combines the seriousness of genetics with a love for nature's beauty, creating art that's both profound and joyful. Her passion shines through in every brushstroke.
Ariel White.long: Get ready to be mesmerized by Ariel White's serious yet whimsy-free art, which pours her deep love for nature & its creatures onto canvas. With roots in genetics, she brings a scientific eye to the beauty of the natural world, crafting pieces that are both profound and joyful.

Michelle Brandt.short: Michelle K. Brandt: Vibrant painter of whimsical scenes & creatures in bold colors.
Michelle Brandt.medium: Michelle K. Brandt's artwork bursts with energy, blending loose impressionistic styles and bright hues to evoke love, happiness & wellbeing.
Michelle Brandt.long: Get lost in the vibrant world of Michelle K. Brandt's paintings! This talented artist brings whimsical scenes & creatures to life with bold colors & loose brushstrokes, inspiring joy & positivity.

Michael Surber.short: Award-winning artist Michael Surber weaves vibrant hues & bold textures into poetic stories.
Michael Surber.medium: Ohio-based artist Michael Surber crafts bold, colorful artworks that tell us our own stories, blending tradition with innovation.
Michael Surber.long: Michael Surber's artwork is a masterful blend of traditional techniques and modern experimentation, weaving vibrant hues & bold textures into poetic stories that invite us to find our own narratives within the beauty of his creations.

Britt Nichole.short: Britt Nichole's photography weaves tales from nature's cycles & quiet spaces, a reflection of her own journey through trauma & rediscovery.
Britt Nichole.medium: As a disabled artist, Britt Nichole finds solace in photography, capturing beauty in ordinary life & nature's rhythms to share with fellow creatives.
Britt Nichole.long: Britt Nichole's Learn To Fly Photography embodies her journey through disability, mental health, and trauma. Through nature-inspired images, she shares her path to self-discovery, voice, and peace.

Nancy Shuler.short: Nancy Shuler: Where dreams intertwine with reality through vibrant color & texture. Her art invites pause, observe & appreciate.
Nancy Shuler.medium: Nancy Shuler's artistic excursion weaves together color, texture & design elements, inviting viewers to pause, observe & appreciate life's splendor. Her work shines in the Dayton area.
Nancy Shuler.long: Get lost in Nancy Shuler's world where dreams and reality blend through captivating colors & textures! As a full-time artist, she invites you on an artistic journey, weaving together design, paint & shared experiences to transform your perspective. With a lifelong passion for art, her pieces have become iconic in the Dayton area.

Kim Ceccarelli.short: Kim Ceccarelli's vibrant pastels & oils capture the essence of life's beauty, reflecting her diverse experiences & travels.
Kim Ceccarelli.medium: Kim Ceccarelli's art is a reflection of her life's journey, from the intensity of steel mill towns to the beauty of travel & culture. Her vibrant pastels & oils evoke emotions & connections with nature's profound beauty.
Kim Ceccarelli.long: Kim Ceccarelli's stunning pastel and oil paintings take you on a journey through her life experiences - from the diverse steel mill town where she grew up, to her travels abroad and the beauty of our natural world. With a focus on capturing light, shadow, and color, Kim's art fosters a deep connection between viewer and subject, inspiring us to appreciate the beauty that surrounds us.

Tamiko Stump.short: Tamiko Stump's figurative paintings explore identity, transformation & womanhood with delicate textures & luminous forms.
Tamiko Stump.medium: Ohio-born artist Tamiko Stump creates evocative, dreamlike paintings that delve into the complexities of self-discovery & human experience. Her work invites introspection and connection through its exploration of archetypal energies and universal themes.
Tamiko Stump.long: Tamiko Stump's figurative art weaves a narrative tapestry of identity, transformation, and womanhood. With delicate textures and luminous forms, her paintings evoke emotion and introspection, celebrating the strength and vulnerability of the human experience. Through her work, Tamiko seeks to reflect the complexities of self-discovery, embracing transformation in both life and art.

Francis Trick.short: Francis Trick's fluid acrylic art combines technique & beauty, manipulating colors in liquid form. Winner of The Dayton Society of Artists Peace Accords Show.
Francis Trick.medium: Francis Trick brings his unique voice to the world through fluid acrylic art, experimenting with techniques that reveal breathtaking beauty in the manipulation of liquid color. Recent winner of a prestigious show.
Francis Trick.long: Francis Trick's artistic journey began after rediscovering his passion for art. He now pours his soul into fluid acrylic art, mesmerizing audiences with the ethereal results. Don't miss his stunning work - it's winning hearts and awards alike!

Lori Daugherty.short: Lori Daugherty: Ohio-based abstract artist known for bold, colorful encaustic masterpieces.
Lori Daugherty.medium: Ohio-based abstract artist Lori Daugherty combines vibrant colors & textures in intricate encaustic works, inviting viewers on an enchanted journey. Her art is a fusion of wax, pigment, ink & shellac, captivating the senses with every layer.
Lori Daugherty.long: Immerse yourself in the enchanting world of Ohio-based abstract artist Lori Daugherty! With a passion for color, texture, and motion, she creates intricate encaustic masterpieces that take viewers on an epic journey. From vibrant hues to tactile textures, each painting is a symphony of layers, inviting you to explore its depths and complexities.

Ryan Stoneberger.short: Ryan Stoneberger crafts contemplative landscape prints with contrasting scales & soft tones, inviting personal interpretation.
Ryan Stoneberger.medium: Ryan Stoneberger's relief prints explore the Sublime & Impressionist traditions, juxtaposing nature's power & beauty through contrast & scale. His work invites viewers to connect with memories of natural environments.
Ryan Stoneberger.long: Ryan Stoneberger's landscape prints balance overwhelming forces with soft tones, exploring the tension between nature's power & quiet beauty. Raised on camping trips with his father, he translates lived experiences into tactile imagery, inviting personal interpretation and connection.

Denee Jones.short: Deneé combines vibrant color & pattern with cultural experience in her inviting, digitally-inspired art. Her canvases feel expressive yet welcoming, like a well-designed interface.
Denee Jones.medium: As a software engineer turned artist, Deneé brings digital finesse to her canvas work, blending vibrant color and pattern with subtle geometric motifs. Each piece invites exploration and connection, echoing the harmony of nature.
Denee Jones.long: Deneé's artistic vision seamlessly merges digital design principles with cultural nuance, crafting visually stunning canvases that feel both expressive and inclusive. Inspired by natural rhythms and careful color layering, her art pauses time, fosters exploration, and celebrates human experience.

Pat McClelland.short: C. Pat McClelland's art weaves math and complexity into vibrant, dynamic visuals.
Pat McClelland.medium: Explore the intricate dialogue between prescribed elements in C. Pat McClelland's paintings, where mathematics meets fine art. Complex concepts merge, overlap, and synthesize into a visual amalgamation.
Pat McClelland.long: Delve into the world of C. Pat McClelland, where math and complexity converge in vibrant, dynamic visuals. With a background in painting and printmaking, McClelland's work navigates base-2 relationships, order/chaos, shape/line, and more, yielding complex yet simple compositions that result from direct dialogue between elements.

Barbara Mandell.short: Barb Mandell's vibrant artwork combines Impressionism & abstract styles with architectural lines & geometric shapes.
Barbara Mandell.medium: Barbara Mandell creates colorful, imaginative art by hand using various mediums. Her unique style blends Impressionism and abstract elements with architectural lines and geometric shapes.
Barbara Mandell.long: Barbara Mandell is a seasoned artist with 47 years of experience. She combines her love of Impressionism and abstract styles with architectural lines and geometric shapes to create vibrant, imaginative pieces that add color and personality to any space.

Jason Goad.short: Jason Goad: Where childhood nostalgia meets abstract expressionism. A seasoned illustrator & fine artist with a passion for experimentation.
Jason Goad.medium: Jason Goad's art is a vibrant fusion of comic book culture, portraiture, and abstract techniques. As a seasoned illustrator & fine artist, he explores new ways to express his ideas.
Jason Goad.long: Step into the world of Jason Goad, where childhood passions meet artistic innovation. A Columbus College of Art and Design graduate with 25+ years as a freelance illustrator, he combines comic book nostalgia, portraiture, and abstract techniques in unique & captivating ways.

Jed Helmers.short: Jed Helmers' work is a masterclass in illustrative technique, with precision and control on full display.
Jed Helmers.medium: Jed Helmers brings a unique attention to detail to his art, focusing on the execution of every line and curve. His technique-driven approach results in visually stunning pieces that demand close inspection.
Jed Helmers.long: With an unwavering commitment to technical excellence, Jed Helmers crafts artworks that are as much about precision as they are about artistic expression. His focus on illustrative technique yields visually striking results, inviting viewers to appreciate the beauty of skilled craftsmanship.

Jan Heaton.short: Jan Heaton's watercolor paintings transport viewers to a world of natural beauty and wonder.
Jan Heaton.medium: Jan Heaton's art is an emotional connection to the viewer, inspired by the structure, color, and patterns in nature. Her watercolors are precise, thoughtful, and carefully planned.
Jan Heaton.long: Jan Heaton's artwork offers a unique perspective on familiar forms, reminding us of feelings, places, and times past. With thousands of stories and life experiences informing her work, Jan invites viewers to interpret the beauty she finds in her world.

Brian Mathus.short: Brian's vibrant figurative paintings reflect his unique fusion of Fauvism, Cubism, and African art, distilled from a lifetime of creative expression.
Brian Mathus.medium: Brian's artwork bursts with energy and emotion, born from his personal quest to remove distorted images and reveal emotionally clear ones. His bold use of color and layering techniques infuse each piece with depth and history.
Brian Mathus.long: As a masterful blend of Fauvism, Cubism, and African art, Brian's paintings shine with an inner light that reflects his unyielding pursuit of emotional clarity. By actively removing distorted images and embracing the ecstatic, he crafts canvases that vibrate with life-giving energy.

Mikee Huber.short: Mikee Huber's vibrant paintings explore human connection & diversity through rhythmic color fields & converging lines.
Mikee Huber.medium: Mikee Huber's process-driven approach blends intuition, structure, and sustained attention in dynamic paintings that reflect her love of music, nature, and community. Her 'Connections' series celebrates the beauty of human ties, fostering a sense of unity and belonging.
Mikee Huber.long: Get lost in Mikee Huber's captivating world, where abstracted landscapes, geometric forms, and vibrant colors come together to tell stories of connection, diversity, and resilience. Inspired by the urban landscape, disco beats, and funk rhythms, her paintings embody the transformative power of community & shared experience.

Pam Geisel.short: Graphic designer turned artist, Pam Geisel crafts vibrant quilts with bold graphics & typography.
Pam Geisel.medium: Pam Geisel's graphic design background shines in her art quilts, blending traditional techniques with modern flair. Her vibrant pieces explore socio-political issues through wordplay and visual narrative.
Pam Geisel.long: With a unique blend of graphic design skills and artistic vision, Pam Geisel creates striking art quilts that balance bold graphics with representational landscapes. She's also pushing boundaries by using typography to explore socio-political issues, sparking meaningful conversations one quilt at a time.

Eva Lewis.short: Eva Lewis paints vibrant, intimate scenes of Midwestern life, inviting viewers to fill in the narrative gaps with her bold color palette and emotive brushstrokes.
Eva Lewis.medium: Eva Lewis's paintings capture the warmth and beauty of everyday moments, set against a backdrop of lush Midwestern landscapes. With a keen eye for composition and a love of color, she invites viewers to become part of her story.
Eva Lewis.long: With a passion for capturing the essence of everyday life, Eva Lewis brings the vibrant colors and textures of the Midwest to life on canvas. Her paintings are invitations to explore the human experience, where moments with friends, animals, and nature blend together in perfect harmony.

Erin Smith Glenn.short: Erin Morgan Smith Glenn's vibrant art blends advocacy, activism & nature, inspiring growth & change. Her unique style shines through in each piece.
Erin Smith Glenn.medium: As an artist & educator, Erin Morgan Smith Glenn brings passion to her work, merging creativity with a desire to leave the world better than she found it. Her art embodies advocacy, activism & HAIRitage.
Erin Smith Glenn.long: Erin Morgan Smith Glenn's artistic journey is a reflection of her values: growth, self-expression, and making the world a better place. With a focus on advocacy, activism, and the beauty of nature, her art inspires viewers to explore their own creative potential.

Xiera Younce.short: Xiera: Vibrant illustrator & ceramicist weaving imaginative worlds with diverse characters & bold colors.
Xiera Younce.medium: Xiera's whimsical style invites viewers into playful, story-driven art pieces that evoke connection & emotion. Their work celebrates diversity & creativity.
Xiera Younce.long: Xiera, a talented illustrator & ceramicist, crafts vibrant, immersive worlds through their distinctive style, blending diverse characters & bold colors to tell stories that foster meaningful connections & emotional depth.

Iden Crockett.short: Iden Crockett: Unflinching poet & artist sharing her journey through adversity and self-discovery.
Iden Crockett.medium: Iden Crockett's intensely personal work blurs the lines between poetry, essay, and art. Her award-winning column and seven volumes of poetry are testaments to a life of non-conformity and resilience.
Iden Crockett.long: Iden Crockett is a transgender poet, essayist, artist, and activist whose unflinching work shares her journey through adversity and self-discovery. With seven volumes of poetry and a weekly column, she embodies the spirit of non-conformity and resilience in the face of personal struggle.

Misty Lynn Bankhead.short: Misty Lynn's art weaves emotions into small spaces with diverse styles from abstract to whimsical.
Misty Lynn Bankhead.medium: Get swept away by Misty Lynn's vibrant paintings, blending nature, life & music-inspired themes in unique styles.
Misty Lynn Bankhead.long: Experience the eclectic world of Misty Lynn, where big emotions meet small spaces. Her art combines travel, daily life, and music influences with varied styles from abstract to whimsical, making each piece a treasure trove of feeling.

Alisa H. Workman.short: Alisa H. Workman's vibrant floral paintings burst with color and life, translating her love of nature into bold brushstrokes.
Alisa H. Workman.medium: Alisa H. Workman's acrylic paintings celebrate life's darkness turned bright with vibrant colors and bold flowers, a reflection of her love for nature and resilience in the face of adversity.
Alisa H. Workman.long: Meet Alisa H. Workman, an Ohio-based artist who pours her heart into acrylic floral paintings that transform life's challenges into colorful, uplifting works of art, reflecting her unique blend of nature, science, and artistic expression.

Michele BonDurant.short: Michele BonDurant's vibrant collages transform everyday scenes into whimsical worlds with layered paint & paper.
Michele BonDurant.medium: Miami-born artist Michele BonDurant crafts stunning collages that blend layers of paint, paper & imagination to reveal the beauty in ordinary landscapes. Her works are a testament to her artistic vision and skill.
Michele BonDurant.long: Michele BonDurant's captivating collages invite viewers to see the world anew by layering paint, paper & imagination. With a focus on light, shape & color, her artworks transport us to enchanted realms where the familiar becomes extraordinary.

Bil Tipton.short: Bil Tipton Art combines DIY culture and skateboarding with multidisciplinary art. Building momentum through community-driven projects.
Bil Tipton.medium: Bil Tipton Art blurs the lines between physical labor, creative expression, and art-making. Through hands-on fabrication and collaborative projects, he strengthens community and builds opportunities for others.
Bil Tipton.long: Bil Tipton's practice merges DIY culture, skateboarding, and multidisciplinary art to build momentum within the community. With a focus on process-driven work and hands-on experience, his projects create tangible impact, connecting artists, small businesses, and community members.

Beth Borchers.short: Beth Borchers: Unleashing love & magic through whimsical paintings & spirit-inspired sculptures, born from a life of self-love & nature's solace. #art #spirituality
Beth Borchers.medium: Get swept away by Beth Borchers' enchanting artwork! A self-taught artist from Kettering, Ohio, she weaves love, magic, and connection into her whimsical paintings and spirit-inspired sculptures, all born from a deep love of nature and the human experience.
Beth Borchers.long: Immerse yourself in the vibrant world of Beth Borchers' artwork! This self-taught artist from Kettering, Ohio, pours her heart and soul into creating enchanting paintings and spirit-inspired sculptures that embody love, magic, and connection. Born from a life of self-love, nature's solace, and a deep appreciation for the human experience, Beth's art invites you to step into a world where whimsy meets wonder, and the boundaries between reality and fantasy blur.

Amy Kollar Anderson.short: Amy Kollar Anderson's surreal paintings blend nature, decorative arts & whimsy. Her dense layers evoke glass or resin.
Amy Kollar Anderson.medium: Amy Kollar Anderson's vibrant paintings combine natural forms, patterns & textures in unexpected ways. Inspired by her love of animals, the environment and dreams.
Amy Kollar Anderson.long: Amy Kollar Anderson creates captivating surrealist paintings that merge the beauty of nature with the magic of decorative arts. Her multi-layered works, featuring intricate details & symbolism, transport viewers to imaginative worlds, inviting them to explore themes of transformation, humor & anxiety.

Erica Keener.short: Erica's vibrant pastels evoke wonder & awe at nature's beauty.
Erica Keener.medium: Erica's bold pastel paintings capture life's fleeting moments, inviting viewers to reconsider the ordinary. Her work shares the sanctuary she finds in nature, particularly the ever-changing skies above.
Erica Keener.long: In Erica's hands, pastels become a window into the world's beauty. Her award-winning art shares the sanctuary she finds in nature, capturing life's fleeting moments with vibrant colors and inviting viewers to reconsider the ordinary. By sharing her passion for the natural world, Erica hopes to inspire others to look up and find wonder in everyday scenes.

Gretchen Durst Jacobs.short: Gretchen Durst Jacobs weaves the natural world into non-objective paintings, exploring themes of climate change and femininity. Her carefully designed grids create a unique tension between geometry and gesture.
Gretchen Durst Jacobs.medium: Discover Gretchen Durst Jacobs' vibrant non-objective paintings, informed by her fascination with the natural world, climate change, and feminist ideas. Her innovative use of color and gridwork reclaims abstract painting as a distinctly feminine process.
Gretchen Durst Jacobs.long: Gretchen Durst Jacobs' artistic vision is rooted in a deep connection to nature and a desire to reclaim abstract painting as a distinctly feminine process. Through non-objective paintings that explore climate change, femininity, and the body/nature relationship, she creates a unique visual language that embodies movement, rhythm, and space.

Lydia Williamson.short: Lydia Williamson's vibrant 'Noodle People' series brings humor & whimsy to human experience. Acrylic & mixed media masterpieces!
Lydia Williamson.medium: Get ready to giggle with Lydia Williamson's 'Noodle People' - exaggerated, long-limbed figures that invite connection & curiosity. Her unique style blends playfulness with depth.
Lydia Williamson.long: Step into the world of Lydia Williamson's 'Noodle People', where humor meets humanity! This talented artist's acrylic & mixed media masterpieces blend whimsy & depth, inviting viewers to project their own meaning onto these lovable figures.

Christy Veres.short: Christy Veres creates vibrant Bohemian Folk art using mixed media & refurbished materials. Her unique style brings joy to all who experience it.
Christy Veres.medium: Christy Veres' artistic journey spans from computer art to woodburning, combining her love of nature, folk style & recycled materials in one-of-a-kind pieces that inspire & delight.
Christy Veres.long: Get ready to be captivated by Christy Veres' eclectic Bohemian Folk art! With a background in computer art, she's now experimenting with mixed media, woodburning, and more. Her passion for nature, folk style, and refurbished materials shines through in each piece, making her art a true celebration of creativity & joy.

Cydnie King.short: Cydnie L. King weaves human figures into botanicals, blending nature & humanity with vibrant colors & mixed media.
Cydnie King.medium: Cydnie L. King's artwork merges humans with flowers, highlighting our connection to the natural world through bright colors and layered textures.
Cydnie King.long: Cydnie L. King's striking visuals merge human forms with plants, illustrating the intricate bond between humanity and nature. With a focus on vibrant colors & mixed media, her work invites us to reconsider our relationship with the environment.

Bill Franz.short: Bill Franz uses photography to shine a light on the most vulnerable members of society, advocating for justice through his art.
Bill Franz.medium: Bill Franz's powerful photography series, 'Not Criminal', humanizes undocumented immigrant children and sparks empathy. His art challenges us to confront the reality of government actions towards immigrants.
Bill Franz.long: As a photographer-activist, Bill Franz uses his lens to amplify the voices of the marginalized. Through projects like 'Not Criminal' and 'and I quote', he shines a light on the injustices faced by immigrants, advocating for compassion and human rights through his art.

Paul Lyons.short: Paul Hitch Lyons: Capturing the emotional tension between nature & urban landscapes through fine art photography.
Paul Lyons.medium: Meet Paul Hitch Lyons, a Dayton-based photographer with over 30 years of experience. His work explores the contrast between natural beauty and urban energy, sparking reflection in those who view his photographs.
Paul Lyons.long: Paul Hitch Lyons' photography tells a cohesive story, blending his Appalachian upbringing and urban life experiences. With over 30 years of expertise, he captures the emotional tension between nature & cityscapes, inspiring new perspectives through fine art photography.

Avory Mayenschein.short: Avory's vibrant watercolors and acrylics burst with energy and movement, inviting a closer look. Color is at the center of everything she creates.
Avory Mayenschein.medium: Get to know emerging artist Avory Mayenschein, whose watercolor and acrylic pieces blend bold color and freedom, reflecting her curiosity and intuitive approach. She's all about growth, play, and letting each piece develop naturally.
Avory Mayenschein.long: Avory Mayenschein is an Ohio-based artist pushing boundaries with her dynamic watercolors and acrylics. With a focus on color, movement, and natural evolution, she invites viewers to slow down and connect with her art on a deeper level, revealing itself over time.

Jeremy Nickoson.short: Jeremy's stunning landscape photography takes you on an adventure through nature's wonders.
Jeremy Nickoson.medium: Capturing the essence of the great outdoors, Jeremy's photography inspires exploration and awe. With a passion for landscapes, stars, and all things natural, his art invites you to get outside and experience the beauty that surrounds us.
Jeremy Nickoson.long: With over 15 years of self-taught experience and a love for adventure, Jeremy's landscape and nature photography has taken him to every corner of America. From the Boundary Waters to Hocking Hills, he's captured the essence of our natural world on metal prints that shimmer with vibrancy. Join Jeremy on an artistic journey through his stunning photographs.

Tami Beale.short: Tami Beale crafts vibrant abstract oil paintings & mixed media on canvas, infusing spaces with geometric beauty.
Tami Beale.medium: Tami Beale's colorful abstracts bring bold, contemporary flair to any space. Her oil paintings feature intricate textures and layered hues.
Tami Beale.long: Tami Beale's artistic journey spans decades of experimentation, culminating in stunning abstract oil paintings & mixed media on canvas that add beauty & boldness to every space.

Janyce Denise Glasper.short: Janyce Denise Glasper: multidisciplinary artist weaving autobiographical acrylic paintings with literary themes and womanist gaze.
Janyce Denise Glasper.medium: Multidisciplinary artist Janyce Denise Glasper combines literature and visual art to explore intimate memories, grief, and love through vibrant, often autobiographical works featuring black women figures. Her paintings reflect a womanist perspective on tender survival mechanisms.
Janyce Denise Glasper.long: Janyce Denise Glasper's captivating acrylic paintings reflect on the intersection of literature and life, as she explores themes of grief, love, and self-discovery through her vibrant and often autobiographical works featuring black women figures. With a womanist gaze, her art serves as a healing vessel, highlighting reading and dreaming as tender survival mechanisms in the face of adversity.

Glenna Jennings.short: Glenna Jennings: photographer & educator weaving global perspectives through the universal language of food and tablescapes.
Glenna Jennings.medium: Glenna Jennings' photographs capture intimate moments at tables worldwide, revealing the human condition in all its complexity. Through her socially-engaged art practice, she cultivates cross-cultural relationships and explores issues of food justice.
Glenna Jennings.long: Glenna Jennings is an artist and educator whose work embodies the intersection of photography, social practice, and food justice. Her ongoing series At Table navigates the global through intimate tablescapes, inviting viewers to join in conversations that blur cultural boundaries.

Ezra Stinson.short: Ezra's vibrant artworks combine recycled materials with bold acrylics, reflecting her passion for sustainability.
Ezra Stinson.medium: Ohio-based artist Ezra crafts visually stunning pieces from reimagined waste, merging art & eco-consciousness in her vibrant assemblage works.
Ezra Stinson.long: Ezra's unique blend of art and sustainability shines through in her mixed-media masterpieces, crafted from reclaimed materials and bursting with color and texture. As a self-taught artist and teacher, she shares her vision for a more environmentally friendly future through her eclectic creations.

Michael Higgins.short: Michael Higgin' art explores transcendence & transformation through eclectic mix of drawing, painting & sculpture.
Michael Higgins.medium: Michael Higgens' unique artistic perspective blends representation & abstraction, exploring themes of transcendence and transformation.
Michael Higgins.long: With a background in drawing and painting, Michael Higgins creates eclectic works that blend representation and abstraction, reflecting her interests in art, history, literature, psychology, science, philosophy, and religion. Her gestural drawings open doors to the unconscious, seeking association and meaning.

Art of Frozen Time (Jeff Smith).short: Jeff Smith's photography captures the fleeting magic of Golden Hour. His signature style weaves together stunning sunsets and peaceful landscapes.
Art of Frozen Time (Jeff Smith).medium: Jeff Smith's photography is a symphony of light and color, capturing the awe-inspiring moments at the end of day. With a focus on Evidence-based design, his images bring solace to those in need, while showcasing the beauty of our world.
Art of Frozen Time (Jeff Smith).long: Get lost in Jeff Smith's Art of Frozen Time, where the interaction of low-angled sun and high-level clouds produce breathtaking colors. With a passion for contre-jour technique and panoramic compositions, he shares the thrill of capturing life's fleeting moments, evoking awe and wonder in all who witness his creations.

Matt Blair.short: Matt Blair's vibrant watercolors capture the essence of Dayton's architecture and culture with a playful touch.
Matt Blair.medium: Matt Blair's artwork celebrates Dayton's history and diversity through whimsical and realistic sketches, showcasing his love for the city.
Matt Blair.long: With a passion for plein air watercolors and urban sketching, Matt Blair brings a fresh perspective to capturing Dayton's unique blend of culture and architecture in his vibrant and playful artworks.

Nancy Dankof.short: Nancy's vibrant watercolors & mixed media pieces reflect her love for nature & creative experimentation.
Nancy Dankof.medium: Nancy's artwork is a fusion of color, texture, and technique, born from her passion for nature photography & art-making. She continues to push boundaries with acrylics & mixed media.
Nancy Dankof.long: Nancy's artistic journey blends watercolor, acrylic, and mixed media, inspired by the beauty of nature and fueled by creative experimentation. Her unique style is a testament to her joy in discovery and growth as an artist.

Elisha Frontz.short: Elisha Frontz weaves intricate patterns & systems into fiber art, revealing the beauty in math & nature.
Elisha Frontz.medium: Elisha Frontz combines traditional materials with fiber art to explore complex systems & patterns in nature and mathematics, reflecting their interconnectedness through intricate details.
Elisha Frontz.long: With a background in sculpture and fine art, Elisha Frontz crafts unique tapestries that merge the elegance of math and science with the organic complexity of the natural world, inviting viewers to contemplate the beauty in interconnectedness.

Rebecca Rowley.short: Rebecca Rowley's linocut prints capture whimsical worlds where nature & emotions collide. Her art is a reflection of her connection to the land, creatures, and loved ones.
Rebecca Rowley.medium: Rebecca Rowley's linocut prints weave intricate stories of love, loss, and connection with the natural world. Each piece is a testament to her unique perspective on the intersection of life & art.
Rebecca Rowley.long: As a linocut print artist, Rebecca Rowley conjures worlds where nature, emotions, and loved ones blend together in harmony. Her work reflects a deep connection to the land, creatures, and memories that shape us. With each piece, she invites viewers to discover their own stories and connections within her art.

Yetunde Rodriguez.short: Yetunde Rodriguez weaves vibrant Nigerian American perspectives into stunning artworks.
Yetunde Rodriguez.medium: Nigerian American artist Yetunde Rodriguez brings diverse experiences to life through her kaleidoscopic art, revealing hidden possibilities everywhere. Her works are a testament to the beauty of cultural fusion.
Yetunde Rodriguez.long: Yetunde Rodriguez, a Dayton-based Nigerian American artist, paints vibrant masterpieces that blend traditional and modern perspectives. Her artworks celebrate the richness of cultural diversity and reveal new possibilities, showcasing the unique voice of this talented artist.

Heather Caulfield.short: Heather Caulfield is a soulful visionary artist & teacher who captures the essence of humanity on canvas.
Heather Caulfield.medium: Heather Caulfield's paintings evoke the soul, as she blends traditional techniques with modern whimsy to create deeply emotional works. A true master of figurative art, her brushstrokes dance across canvases, revealing the infinite ONE within each subject.
Heather Caulfield.long: Heather Caulfield is a multidisciplinary artist & teacher whose love of portraiture and figurative studies shines through in her vibrant oil paintings. Drawing inspiration from Renaissance masters, she infuses her work with a sense of wonder & magic, capturing the essence of humanity on canvas. A true creative visionary, Heather's art is a testament to the infinite ONE within us all.

Jon Daugherty.short: Jon Daugherty crafts whimsical art through soft pastel paintings & paper tube sculptures, making a lasting impact on Dayton's community.
Jon Daugherty.medium: Meet Jon Daugherty, a Dayton native who brings product development expertise to his artistic pursuits. His soft pastel paintings and inventive paper tube sculptures showcase his unique perspective & passion for making art accessible.
Jon Daugherty.long: Jon Daugherty is a Dayton-based artist & product developer who co-founded Darty Art Studio & Gallery with his wife Lori. Through his soft pastel paintings, whimsical paper tube sculptures, & community-driven installations, Jon brings art to life, fostering creativity & connection in the Dayton community.

Loura Lawrence.short: Loura's vibrant photography brings attention to life's small wonders, blending photojournalism with impressionistic flair.
Loura Lawrence.medium: Loura's unique blend of photojournalism and impressionism shines through in her captivating travel and nature photography, paired with bold jewelry designs featuring gemstones, pearls, and vintage beads.
Loura Lawrence.long: As a seasoned photographer and jewelry designer, Loura crafts visually stunning pieces that reflect her love for small wonders. Her travel and nature photography combines photojournalistic realism with impressionistic flair, while her jewelry showcases bold, eclectic designs made from precious stones, pearls, and vintage trinkets.

Gavin Mead.short: Gavin Mead's dreamlike photos blur the line between reality & fantasy, capturing emotions over moments.
Gavin Mead.medium: Gavin Mead's photography dissolves boundaries between reality & dreams. Inspired by Dada and Surrealism, his Mordancage process warps memories into ethereal visions.
Gavin Mead.long: Delve into Gavin Mead's dreamworld, where memories morph into surreal landscapes. Blending film photography with experimental processes like Mordancage, he captures emotions that transcend time & space.

Christine Gaffney.short: Christine Gaffney blurs body & object boundaries in sculptural portraits that challenge traditional notions of self-representation.
Christine Gaffney.medium: Interdisciplinary artist Christine Gaffney uses sculpture, drawing, and technology to explore body politics, feminism, and disability justice. Her works subvert classical art traditions by collapsing subject-object relationships and challenging the male gaze.
Christine Gaffney.long: Christine Gaffney's innovative practice combines sculpture, drawing, and AI-generated images to reimagine self-representation. By employing her own body as a sculptural object and incorporating 'evidence' of construction, she challenges traditional notions of artmaking and reception. Her works also comment on the unitary nature of the male gaze and explore the intersection of technology and human presence.

Gae Helton.short: Gae brings whimsical wonder to her watercolor, acrylic, and glass mosaics, inspired by nature's splendor. Her murals uplift & brighten public spaces.
Gae Helton.medium: Inspirited by nature's beauty, Gae creates vibrant watercolors, acrylics, and stunning glass mosaics that uplift & brighten public spaces through her murals.
Gae Helton.long: Gae's artistic journey spans mediums from watercolor to acrylic, digital art, and glass mosaics. Inspired by the whimsy of nature, she crafts vibrant artworks that bring joy & beauty to public spaces.

Abiona Venee.short: AV Glass weaves vibrant hues and textures through glass art, blending technique with intuition.
Abiona Venee.medium: AV Glass crafts mesmerizing glass sculptures at AV Glass in Dayton, Ohio, where technique meets artistic expression. Combining skills from lampwork bead making and hot shop apprenticeships.
Abiona Venee.long: At AV Glass, artist AV Glass masterfully combines technical skill with creative vision to craft stunning glass art pieces. Blending techniques learned in lampwork bead making and hot shops, they create intricate, textured works of art that inspire the senses.

Linnea Albers.short: Linnea's oil paintings capture quiet moments of life, blending traditional & modern techniques to reveal the human experience.
Linnea Albers.medium: Linnea's artwork is a reflection of her life experiences, using portraiture & symbolism in oil painting to convey emotions & connections. Her unique style brings depth to everyday moments.
Linnea Albers.long: Get lost in Linnea's oil paintings, where traditional techniques meet modern perspectives. She explores the human experience through quiet portraits and symbolic scenes, inviting viewers to reflect on life's complexities.

Kate Santucci.short: Kate Huser Santucci's encaustic paintings reveal the intricate dance between humans and environment.
Kate Santucci.medium: Kate Huser Santucci's encaustic paintings explore human connection to nature, time, and perception through layered textures and hidden imagery.
Kate Santucci.long: Kate Huser Santucci's multidisciplinary practice delves into the interconnectedness of humans with their environment. Her encaustic paintings use asemic writing, mark making, and microorganisms to convey the complexities of communication, evolution, and our place in the world.

Katherine Sacksteder.short: Katherine's work reflects her fascination with nature & self-discovery through deconstructed forms.
Katherine Sacksteder.medium: Katherine's art is a reflection of her search for self, breaking down subjects to their essential forms & exploring what remains. Her unique perspective weaves together nature & human experience.
Katherine Sacksteder.long: Get lost in Katherine's captivating world where nature meets introspection. Her deconstructed forms invite you to explore the essence of being, revealing hidden connections between humans & the natural world.

Samantha Wott.short: Samantha Wott: Mixed-media artist blending fantasy creatures & mythological themes with bold, empowering messages.
Samantha Wott.medium: Samantha Wott's vibrant artwork combines mixed mediums to depict strong, powerful figures inspired by literature, film, and the performing arts. Her pieces spark a feeling to fight for life and protect what matters most.
Samantha Wott.long: Samantha Wott's unique artistic perspective merges fantasy creatures with mythological themes, set amidst bold, empowering messages. Inspired by her travels, love of dance, and strong interests in literature & film, she crafts vibrant, mixed-medium pieces that spark a feeling to fight for life and protect what matters most.

Terry Welker.short: Terry Welker, FAIA, creates lightweight kinetic sculpture that dances in space, merging architecture & nature.
Terry Welker.medium: Meet Terry Welker, a master architect/sculptor who weaves poetry into permanent and temporary public art. His kinetic sculptures capture the essence of natural forces, inviting viewers to engage with movement and form.
Terry Welker.long: Terry Welker, FAIA, is an innovator in the realm of sculpture and architecture, crafting captivating kinetic works that harmonize nature and design. Through experimentation, he pushes materials' limits, creating intricate forms that enthrall audiences with their fluid dance and dynamic conversations with light.

Dave Crowell.short: A lifelong artist, designer, and framer, this creator channels philosophy and human experience into authentic work.
Dave Crowell.medium: A lifelong artist and designer, this creator uses history, philosophy, and belief to fuel authentic expression. With a deep passion for the human experience, this artist sees art as a social engine and cultural driver.
Dave Crowell.long: A lifelong artist, designer, and founder of Custom Frame Services, Inc., this creator brings philosophy, history, and human observation into every piece. Driven by an insatiable passion for authentic expression, this artist works daily toward a higher creative standard. Art, to this artist, is both a social engine and a cultural driver.

Lee Maxwell.short: An aspiring artist just beginning their creative journey, full of potential and vision.
Lee Maxwell.medium: An aspiring artist, they are just beginning their creative journey. With a bold "Let's get Started" spirit, this artist is ready to make their mark.
Lee Maxwell.long: An aspiring artist, they are just beginning their creative journey with energy and ambition. Their rallying cry, "Let's get Started," reflects a fearless approach to creativity. Watch closely as this artist finds their voice and shapes their unique perspective.

Nanette B. Isaac.short: Faith-driven portrait artist whose pencil drawings carry scripture references, inviting viewers into God's word.
Nanette B. Isaac.medium: Faith-driven portrait artist, her Holy Inspired Series embeds scripture references directly into each drawing. Her charcoal and pencil works invite viewers to open a Bible and seek a personal message from God.
Nanette B. Isaac.long: Portrait artist whose creative process is rooted in prayer and spiritual guidance, her Holy Inspired Series weaves scripture references into each carefully crafted drawing. Since returning to her practice in 2025, she has earned recognition in both the Women's TriArt Society Art Show and the 18th Annual Hoffman Global Methodist Church Fine Arts Show. Each piece carries her hallmark humility, inviting viewers to seek hope and truth through God's word.

Tom Croce.short: Ohio's own landscape photographer captures nature's fleeting magic with breathtaking artistry.
Tom Croce.medium: A self-taught Ohio native, this full-time nature photographer blends philosophy with stunning visuals. His work invites serene reflection on our shared existence.
Tom Croce.long: Since 2010, this self-taught Ohio photographer has pursued nature full-time, blending architectural training with a deep love of the wild. His images capture light dancing across silhouetted trees and glowing mountain sunsets. Each photograph tells a story of interconnectedness, mindfulness, and the quiet beauty surrounding us all.

Kathleen Caffrey.short: Anthrosercher blends history, culture, and human courage into art that transforms curiosity into meaning.
Kathleen Caffrey.medium: Anthrosercher channels a lifelong study of humanity into works rooted in archaeology, history, and cultural memory. Their art bridges past and present, using emotion to explore the complex realities we all navigate daily.
Kathleen Caffrey.long: Anthrosercher draws from archaeology, history, and the echoes of cultures past to create art that is both deeply personal and universally human. Raised among Civil War sites and civil rights history in Alabama, their work carries the weight and courage of those who came before. Spanning oils, watercolors, graphite, and beyond, Anthrosercher refuses stagnation, letting curiosity lead the way.

Robert Farley.short: Fine art photographer capturing America's landscapes, nature, and urban scenes with a decade of coast-to-coast vision.
Robert Farley.medium: Fine art photographer capturing landscapes, nature, and urban scenes across the US for over a decade. Their award-winning work is displayed at The ARTery at Front Street and shows across Ohio.
Robert Farley.long: Fine art photographer capturing landscapes, nature, and urban scenes across America for over a decade. Their coast-to-coast travels have produced a stunning body of work now displayed at The ARTery at Front Street. Award-winning and exhibited across Ohio, their photography transforms personal journeys into art.

Danielle Harper.short: Danielle Harper creates vibrant abstract art rooted in joy, color, and the thrill of exploration.
Danielle Harper.medium: Danielle Harper transforms acrylic paint and inventive tools into abstract works full of warmth. Her art is driven by a genuine love of creating and a desire to bring happiness to every viewer.
Danielle Harper.long: Danielle Harper is an abstract artist whose passion for creating began just two years ago and quickly grew into a defining part of her identity. Working with acrylics and an ever-evolving set of tools, she constantly explores new techniques to keep her work fresh. Her goal is simple and powerful: to share art that brings happiness and love to the world.

Dan Landis.short: Dan Landis chases transcendent moments in nature, capturing scenes that connect us to something profound.
Dan Landis.medium: Dan Landis has spent over 50 years behind the lens, transforming nature's fleeting moments into lasting art. His photography seeks the profound connection between viewer and the natural world.
Dan Landis.long: Dan Landis brings over 50 years of photographic expertise to every image he creates. Rooted in a career that began in 1970, he now channels decades of craft into nature photography that captures transcendent moments. A resident artist at Sugarcreek Photography Gallery in Bellbrook, Ohio, Dan Landis turns sweeping landscapes and dazzling details into deeply moving works.

Marlene Steele.short: Marlene Steele paints boldly, letting color and instinct lead the way.
Marlene Steele.medium: Marlene Steele creates vibrant, unplanned paintings shaped by her state of mind. Each canvas is a live discovery, driven by daring color and raw intuition.
Marlene Steele.long: Marlene Steele is a bold painter who lets instinct steer every brushstroke, embracing color without a fixed plan. Her mood shapes each piece as it unfolds, making every work a genuine surprise. Marlene Steele invites us to celebrate the beauty found in unpredictability and the joy of pure creation.

Joey Easton.short: Joey Easton paints expressive realist oils where light tells the story in a single frame.
Joey Easton.medium: Joey Easton blends expressionism and realism in oil paintings driven by atmospheric light and mood. Rooted in fine arts and 25 years of documentary filmmaking, her work captures compelling stories in one frame.
Joey Easton.long: Joey Easton brings a documentarian's eye to expressive realist oil painting, always chasing atmospheric light and a story worth telling. Raised in a home full of art and salvaged materials, and shaped by 25 years of documentary filmmaking, she carries that storytelling instinct into every canvas. Her style shifts between expressive and realistic depending on her mood and subject.

Lindsey Tribelhorn.short: Lindsey Tribelhorn paints portals to alternate realities, bending perception through vivid acrylics.
Lindsey Tribelhorn.medium: Lindsey Tribelhorn creates art that evokes hallucination without drugs, challenging reality through bold acrylics and mixed media. Her work has graced galleries and festival murals across the Midwest.
Lindsey Tribelhorn.long: Lindsey Tribelhorn transforms perception into an experience, crafting acrylic paintings that blur the line between reality and hallucination. A self-taught artist based in Dayton, she has exhibited across Ohio, Indiana, Chicago, and Denver. Her murals have electrified festivals throughout the Midwest, proving her vision resonates far beyond the canvas.

Roxanne Grooms.short: Roxanne Grooms transforms circles into characters, weaving rich earthy hues into dynamic visual stories.
Roxanne Grooms.medium: Roxanne Grooms uses the circle as a living character in her work, anchored by stitches and threads in rich earthly tones. Her art blends fine arts training with a bold, imaginative visual language.
Roxanne Grooms.long: Roxanne Grooms brings duality to life through the circle — at once soft and powerful — set against rich earthy hues and intricate threads that ground each piece in narrative. A fine arts graduate with roots in military illustration and corporate design, her discipline and depth shine through every composition. Her work invites viewers to engage their imagination and step into the story.

Bruce Soifer.short: Bruce Soifer captures fleeting moments of creation with a painter's eye and a photographer's precision.
Bruce Soifer.medium: Bruce Soifer blends a painter's eye with photographic instinct to freeze the magic of human creativity and nature. His award-winning lens transforms dancers, musicians, and sunsets into timeless art.
Bruce Soifer.long: Bruce Soifer sees the world with a painter's eye, a camera's mind, and the deep heart of a storyteller. From dancers mid-leap to musicians lost in sound, he chases the fleeting moments of creation. A multi-award winner across the Miami Valley, his work captures passion, joy, and beauty in their most honest forms.

Jeff Rutledge.short: Jeff Rutledge crafts bold stainless steel sculptures that captivate collectors and corporations alike.
Jeff Rutledge.medium: Jeff Rutledge transforms stainless steel into striking sculptures sought by collectors and corporations. His welded works bring lasting, industrial elegance to any space.
Jeff Rutledge.long: Jeff Rutledge is a sculptor with a BFA and MFA who works exclusively in welded stainless steel. His commanding pieces are sought by collectors and corporations who value bold, enduring art. Rutledge's work bridges fine art and architectural presence, making a statement wherever it stands.

Karen Bender.short: Karen Bender captures raw, intimate moments in stunning detail across pen, acrylic & watercolor.
Karen Bender.medium: Karen Bender creates deeply realistic ink drawings where solitary figures invite quiet reflection. Her work spans animals, humans & landscapes, rooted in Southwest Ohio.
Karen Bender.long: Karen Bender has devoted her life to art since age five, mastering pen, acrylic, and watercolor. Her intricate ink drawings portray vulnerable, intimate moments that pull viewers into a shared introspective experience. Each solitary figure she renders becomes a silent conversation between art and audience.

Libby Rudolf.short: Libby Rudolf paints expressive watercolors, capturing the essence of scenes and people through color and form.
Libby Rudolf.medium: Libby Rudolf brings scenes and people to life through expressive watercolors, weaving color and form into vivid impressions. Her plein air roots keep her work grounded in the living world.
Libby Rudolf.long: Libby Rudolf is an expressive watercolorist whose paintings capture the soul of a scene or person through bold color and flowing form. Rooted in a lifelong practice, she paints from life and plein air, bringing an immediate, living quality to her work. Her paintings can be found at Village Artisans in Yellow Springs, Ohio.

Dayton Ohio Photos (Kevin Myers).short: Dayton Ohio Photos (Kevin Myers) captures the city's soul through night scenes, architecture, and landscapes.
Dayton Ohio Photos (Kevin Myers).medium: Dayton Ohio Photos (Kevin Myers) transforms familiar cityscapes into stunning visual stories. His night photography and architectural shots reveal Dayton's hidden beauty.
Dayton Ohio Photos (Kevin Myers).long: Dayton Ohio Photos (Kevin Myers) has been revealing Dayton's finest angles since 2019. Specializing in night photography, architecture, and landscapes, his lens finds the extraordinary in everyday scenes. His work is on display at Village Artisans Co-Op in Yellow Springs, OH.

Elizabeth Patterson.short: Elizabeth Patterson paints raw emotion and queer joy through bold portraiture and conceptual oil works.
Elizabeth Patterson.medium: Elizabeth Patterson channels grief, identity, and conviction into striking portraits and bold oil paintings. Her work centers LGBTQ+ representation, offering the visibility she once needed herself.
Elizabeth Patterson.long: Elizabeth Patterson creates deeply personal portraiture and conceptual oil paintings driven by emotion, identity, and queer joy. Working in pen, ink, and oil on canvas, she layers color and texture to capture what words cannot express. A lifelong artist and proud lesbian, Elizabeth Patterson centers LGBTQ+ representation in every brushstroke—giving others the visibility she once longed for.

Dorian Campbell.short: Dorian Campbell romanticizes Dayton's rust-belt landscape through printmaking and quilted fabric.
Dorian Campbell.medium: Dorian Campbell transforms Dayton's post-industrial streets into sacred, folkloric imagery. Through linoleum prints and handsewn quilts, everyday childhood moments become enshrined in monochromatic warmth.
Dorian Campbell.long: Dorian Campbell turns the overlooked rust-belt landscapes of Dayton into tender, folk-inspired art. Drawing on childhood memory and religious symbolism, their printmaking and fiber work enshrine the everyday. Quilted and hand-stitched, each piece carries the warmth of place, tradition, and the quiet sacredness of growing up.

Emily Morgan Wick.short: Emily Morgan Wick paints quiet, forgotten places—wet pavement, lichen, overgrown roads.
Emily Morgan Wick.medium: Emily Morgan Wick finds beauty in decay and the overlooked. Her paintings capture wet pavement, pale lichen, and overgrown farm roads with nostalgic warmth.
Emily Morgan Wick.long: Emily Morgan Wick transforms the overlooked into art—streetlamps on wet pavement, lichen on old trees, crumbling farm roads. Rejecting grand vistas, she paints the decaying backwater landscapes of her childhood. Her work is a tender, nostalgic tribute to forgotten places.

Shirley Tucker.short: Shirley Tucker blends bold color and structured lines to capture youth through mixed media abstraction.
Shirley Tucker.medium: Shirley Tucker fuses structured lines with vibrant, free-flowing color to portray young adults and children. Her mixed media work invites viewers to examine how perception shapes the way we see others.
Shirley Tucker.long: Shirley Tucker creates bold mixed media abstractions that explore how we perceive young adults and children through color, line, and emotion. Her work challenges viewers to confront the space between subjective perception and objective reality. Through vibrant, free-flowing hues and structured form, Shirley Tucker builds a visual lens that is as inviting as it is thought-provoking.
